title: caralluma europaea subsp. gussoneana
intro: Caralluma europaea subsp. gussoneana, also known as Caralluma gussonei, is a succulent plant species native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-obesity effects. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing body weight, improving lipid profiles, and lowering blood sugar levels. In terms of herbal preparations, Caralluma europaea subsp. gussoneana is often used in the form of capsules, tablets, or extracts, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
